'''bathoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hiccupper|hiccupper]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-th-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hiccupper|hiccupper]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bathoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bætheheth|bætheheth]] || [[word:bæthehej|bæthehej]] || [[word:bæthehesh|bæthehesh]] || [[word:bæthehe|bæthehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bathothohoth|bathothohoth]] || [[word:bathothohoj|bathothohoj]] || [[word:bathothohosh|bathothohosh]] || [[word:bathothoho|bathothoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bathohoth|bathohoth]] || [[word:bathohoj|bathohoj]] || [[word:bathohosh|bathohosh]] || [[word:bathoho|bathoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bathofhoth|bathofhoth]] || [[word:bathofhoj|bathofhoj]] || [[word:bathofhosh|bathofhosh]] || [[word:bathofhof|bathofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bathohotho|bathohotho]] || [[word:bathohojo|bathohojo]] || [[word:bathohosho|bathohosho]] || [[word:bathohoko|bathohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bathohoth|bathohoth]] || [[word:bathohoj|bathohoj]] || [[word:bathohosh|bathohosh]] || [[word:bathoho|bathoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bathohothol|bathohothol]] || [[word:bathohojol|bathohojol]] || [[word:bathohoshol|bathohoshol]] || [[word:bathohokol|bathohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bathohothotho|bathohothotho]] || [[word:bathohojojo|bathohojojo]] || [[word:bathohoshosho|bathohoshosho]] || [[word:bathohoko|bathohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bathohothon|bathohothon]] || [[word:bathohojon|bathohojon]] || [[word:bathohoshon|bathohoshon]] || [[word:bathohokon|bathohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bathohothoro|bathohothoro]] || [[word:bathohojoro|bathohojoro]] || [[word:bathohoshoro|bathohoshoro]] || [[word:bathohokoro|bathohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
